title: Macenity Weapons And Tools
body:
Re-textured weapons and tools towards more mace - color style

All _netherite_ weapons will apply new textures except for netherite axe, for netherite axe texture to apply name it "Blinder"

*Netherite axe ("Blinder") model wasn't made by me i only re-textured it, the model was made for Manepear's 3d weapons, i don't know the author.
